failingExample: Progress total inconsistency detected: 17 calls use total=28, 1 call uses total=40 (Module 32). This confirms Module 32 uses different total causing progress jumps from 96.4% (27/28) to 75% (30/40).
message: Bug condition exploration test successfully detected the progress inconsistency bug. Test failed as expected on unfixed code, confirming the bug exists.
